clean bathrooms

reviews.comment:
el restaurante de Aca esta muy caro y no hay mucha diferencia entre ser socio o no, te sirven un suculento plato de comida para conpartir eso esta bueno.

(Translated by Google)
The restaurant here is very expensive and there's not much difference between being a member or not; they serve you a delicious plate of food to share, which is good.

reviews.comment:
Muy buen lugar. Luego el camino de la Rn 151 Un Infierno. Pésimo. Alguien se puede matar. De ese lugar hasta Santa Isabel imposible de conducir.

(Translated by Google)
Very nice place. Then the road on Route 151 is a nightmare. Terrible. Someone could get killed. From there to Santa Isabel, it's impossible to drive.
